_comment: Intel-Mac-only overlay, merged via `tauri build --config` in release.yml. Bundles the ONNX Runtime dylib that ort's load-dynamic path loads at runtime (Intel Mac has no static prebuilt). NOT applied to the arm64 build, which links ONNX statically. The dylib is staged into src-tauri/frameworks/ by the 'Stage ONNX Runtime dylib' CI step.
